mission.title: rook: Docs needed: Node Shutdown with Rook/Ceph hangs
mission.description: Docs needed: Node Shutdown with Rook/Ceph hangs. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current rook deployment
steps.description:
Verify your rook version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
helm list -n rook 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working rook installation.

steps.title: Review rook configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant rook configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
kubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook
```
**Is this a bug report or feature request?**
* Feature Request

**What should the feature do:**
Please document the procedure how to cleanly shutdown a Rook operated Ceph.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Docs needed: Node Shutdown with Rook/Ceph hangs
steps.description:
CSI part is fixed in https://github.com/ceph/ceph-csi/pull/809 which will be part of the next ceph-csi release. we also need deployment template change in rook to mount `/run/mount` from host to container in daemonset pod
```yaml
$ cat /etc/systemd/system/rook-umount.service
[Unit]
Description=rook-ceph mounts
Requires=docker.service
Before=docker.service
After=network-online.target

[Service]
ExecStop=/etc/periodic/rook-umount.sh
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

$ cat /etc/periodic/rook-umount.sh
#!/bin/bash
for m in `mount | grep cephfs | sed -r 's/.* on (.*?) type ceph .*/\1/'`; do
    timeout 5 umount $m || timeout 5 umount -l $m || timeout 5 umount -f $m
done
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
kubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Docs needed: Node Shutdown with Rook/Ceph hangs" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: CSI part is fixed in https://github.com/ceph/ceph-csi/pull/809 which will be part of the next ceph-csi release. we also need deployment template change in rook to mount `/run/mount` from host to container in daemonset pod
codeSnippets:
$ cat /etc/systemd/system/rook-umount.service
[Unit]
Description=rook-ceph mounts
Requires=docker.service
Before=docker.service
After=network-online.target

[Service]
ExecStop=/etc/periodic/rook-umount.sh
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

$ cat /etc/periodic/rook-umount.sh
#!/bin/bash
for m in `mount | grep cephfs | sed -r 's/.* on (.*?) type ceph .*/\1/'`; do
    timeout 5 umount $m || timeout 5 umount -l $m || timeout 5 umount -f $m
done

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible.
